task.title: Core Business Logic API (Rex - Rust/Axum)
task.description: Build high-performance REST API service handling core business operations
task.details: Set up Axum web framework, Implement request/response models, Create database connection pool, Build CRUD operations, Add validation and sanitization, Implement structured error handling, Create OpenAPI documentation, Implement rate limiting

decision.options: URL versioning, Header versioning, Content negotiation
